info.title: Flexport API
info.description: The Flexport API v2 provides programmatic access to Flexport's freight forwarding and logistics platform. Use it to manage shipments, bookings, purchase orders, documents, and more.

get.summary: List all products for a client

BearerAuth.description: API key passed as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

BadRequest.description: Bad request – invalid parameters or malformed request body.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized – missing or invalid API key.

prev.description: Link to the previous page, or null.

next.description: Link to the next page, or null.

shipment_ids.description: List of shipment IDs to create shareable URLs for.

expires_at.description: Optional expiration date-time for the shareable URLs.

url.description: Public URL to fetch the document from.

shipment_id.description: Shipment ID to calculate emissions for.

tags.name: Shipments
tags.description: Shipments, shipment legs, containers, and ocean container legs

tags.name: Purchase Orders
tags.description: Purchase orders, PO line items, and container load results

tags.name: Bookings
tags.description: Bookings, booking line items, and booking amendments

tags.name: Network
tags.description: Companies, company entities, contacts, and locations
